name: Weather Tool
description: Single-purpose weather tool for weather, forecast, rain, umbrella, temperature, hot, cold, city, tonight, tomorrow, weekend, and morning.

name: Travel Tool
description: Single-purpose travel tool for flight, train, hotel, ticket, destination, trip, station, Friday travel, nights, and booking.

name: Calculation Tool
description: Single-purpose calculation tool for calculate, add, times, convert, miles, kilometers, percent, tip, bill, and arithmetic.

name: Document Tool
description: Single-purpose document tool for summarize, bullet points, extract action items, rewrite email, notes, paragraph, and text editing.

name: Finance Tool
description: Single-purpose finance tool for stock, Tesla, Apple, Bitcoin, crypto, price, closing price, market, and performance.

name: Calendar Tool
description: Single-purpose calendar tool for alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, move, reschedule, and calendar events.
